## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and reviewable.
- [ ] Tests pass or omissions are explained.
- [ ] Secrets and sensitive data are absent.
- [ ] Security and financial-safety constraints remain enforced.
- [ ] Relevant documentation, changelog, state, and handoff are updated.
- [ ] No unreviewed technology choice or architectural decision is introduced.
